newAndRising.name: huangweiqingclaw
newAndRising.description: HuangweiqingClaw 是基于 OpenClaw 深度演进的自研多模态 AI Agent 引擎，致力于构建“手眼脑”协同的本地自动化编排系统。  核心亮点：  动态技能加载：Agent 通过阅读 Markdown 文档（如 WhatsApp API）自主学习新功能，无需硬编码 Python 脚本。  上下文降维算法：内置动态摘要与分页机制，解决超长 CLI 或文件读取导致的 Token 溢出痛点。  全栈控制与记忆：整合跨平台 CLI、MySQL 存储及异步记忆快照，实现具备长短期记忆的闭环智能体。  通过解耦模型与业务，本项目将 LLM 转化为驱动本地操作系统的真实生产力。

newAndRising.name: ClawAI
newAndRising.description: Claw is a local-first AI control plane that runs powerful open models on your machine and connects to top LLM providers. It intelligently routes every prompt to the best model, giving you one secure workspace for chat, memory, context, connectors, routing, and full AI orchestration.

newAndRising.name: ai-memory-mcp
newAndRising.description: Persistent memory for any AI — MCP server, HTTP API, CLI. Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, and any MCP client. 97.8% R@5 on LongMemEval. Pure SQLite FTS5, zero cloud dependencies.
